command: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host command -v tar
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host command -v mysql
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host sudo doveadm user '*' >/dev/null 2>&1
mysqldump  custalpha_wpdemo | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mysql  custgammasql1'
mysqldump  custalpha_analytics | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mysql  custgammasql2'

tar -cf - -C /var/customers/webs/custalpha/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custalpha/var/customers/webs/custalpha/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/var/customers/webs/custalpha/'

tar -cf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/wp-demo.test/'

tar -cf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/ . | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -p 22 -l root dummy-host 'mkdir -p /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/ && tar -xf - -C /data/customers/custalpha/static-demo.test/'
